top_signals.title: ‘Moment of jeopardy’: City leaders issue rallying cry to safeguard London’s future as top financial hub
top_signals.summary: London stands at a “moment of jeopardy”, top business leaders have warned, as they issued a rallying cry to secure the Square Mile’s future as a top global financial hub. The City bigwigs, including Soc Gen UK chief executive Thierry d’Argent, London Metal Exchange boss Matthew Chamberlain and former City minister Bim Afolami, have called [...]
